title: Rustyfault
description: A simple pvp pack that aims for simplicity while keeping a vanilla feel. And the rusty coloured items of course.
body:
# Rustyfault 
A modern, simple, 16x texture pack that boasts vibrant, simple rusty textures that enhance the PvP experience while keeping the same vanilla look

## Features 
Clean, rusty/brown textures

Simple armour to improve aim 

Custom elytra with a trim for extra style 

Short swords for increased visibility


## Compatibility 
From versions 1.14 to the 1.21.11 
16x textures for the classic, vanilla feel
